ingredients_text: 64% Brioche (Wheat Flour, Water, Sugar, Egg, Crème Fraîche (Milk), Concentrated Butter [Butter (Milk), Colour: Carotenes], Rapeseed Oil, Yeast, Emulsifiers: Mono - and Diglycerides of Fatty Acids, Mono - and Diacetyl Tartaric Acid Esters of Mono - and Diglycerides of Fatty Acids, Sodium Stearoyl-2-Lactylate; Salt, Natural Vanilla Flavouring, Wheat Gluten, Colour: Carotenes; Dried Wheat Sourdough, Skimmed Milk, Milk Protein, Pea Protein, Preservative: Calcium Propionate; Flour Treatment Agent: Ascorbic Acid), 36% Chocolate Flavoured Filling (Water, 6% Milk Chocolate Chips [Sugar, Whole Milk Powder, Cocoa Butter, Cocoa Mass, Lactose (Milk), Emulsifier: Soya Lecithins; Natural Vanilla Flavouringl, Sugar, Invert Sugar Syrup, Egg White, Modified Potato Starch, Whole Milk Powder, Natural Vanilla Flavouring, Cocoa Powder, Corn Starch, Skimmed Milk Powder, Thickener: Sodium Alginate; Preservatives: Potassium Sorbate, Calcium Propionate; Salt, Emulsifier: Mono - and Diglycerides of Fatty Acids; Ground Spices [Paprika, Turmeric]).
